# Research challenge

Use this template for a specific, evidence-aware challenge. Do not include private learner data.

## Affected file or stage

<!-- Give the path and section, for example research/stage-01-human-baseline/STAGE_GUIDE.md. -->

## Claim or reasoning being challenged

<!-- Quote or accurately summarise the claim, assumption, conclusion or reasoning step. -->

## Type of challenge

- [ ] Evidence does not support the claim
- [ ] Important counterevidence is missing
- [ ] Claim is overstated
- [ ] Assumption is hidden
- [ ] Normative judgement is not labelled
- [ ] Speculative projection is treated as prediction
- [ ] Cultural, access or generalisability concern
- [ ] Developmental appropriateness concern
- [ ] Traceability problem
- [ ] Implementation feasibility concern
- [ ] Ethical, privacy or safeguarding concern
- [ ] Other

## Why this matters

<!-- Explain the downstream, public, ethical or implementation consequence. -->

## Evidence, source or reasoning

<!-- Link or cite supporting material and state its relevant limits. -->

## Seriousness

- [ ] Low — wording or clarity issue
- [ ] Moderate — affects interpretation
- [ ] High — affects a stage conclusion or downstream use
- [ ] Critical — may require rollback or major revision

## Proposed resolution

<!-- Suggest revised wording, a caution, reclassification, additional evidence or reopening a stage. -->

## Submission checklist

- [ ] I identified the specific file or claim affected.
- [ ] I explained why the issue matters.
- [ ] I distinguished disagreement from a demonstrated research correction.
- [ ] I included no private learner data.
